targets.rawSql:
SELECT toFloat64(countDistinct(stream_id)) AS value
FROM naap.agg_stream_status_samples
WHERE sample_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE
AND is_attributed = 1 AND orch_address != ''
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), orch_address))

WITH ens AS (SELECT eth_address AS addr, name AS ens_name FROM naap.orch_metadata FINAL),
latest_per_stream AS (
    SELECT stream_id, org, orch_address, pipeline, gateway,
        argMax(output_fps, sample_ts) AS latest_output_fps,
        argMax(state, sample_ts) AS latest_state,
        max(sample_ts) AS latest_sample_ts
    FROM naap.agg_stream_status_samples
    WHERE sample_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE AND is_attributed = 1
    GROUP BY stream_id, org, orch_address, pipeline, gateway
)
SELECT s.stream_id AS "Stream ID",
    if(ifNull(ens.ens_name, '') != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(ens.ens_name), '0x'), ens.ens_name, s.orch_address) AS "Orchestrator ENS",
    ifNull(s.pipeline, 'unknown') AS "Pipeline",
    s.gateway AS "Gateway",
    round(ifNull(s.latest_output_fps, 0), 2) AS "FPS",
    s.latest_state AS "State",
    toUInt64(greatest(dateDiff('second', s.latest_sample_ts, now()), 0)) AS "Last Sample Age (s)"
FROM latest_per_stream s
LEFT JOIN ens e ON e.addr = s.orch_address
WHERE s.latest_sample_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), s.org))
AND ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), s.orch_address))
ORDER BY "Last Sample Age (s)" ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_ts, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS time,
    event_type AS stage,
    count() AS events_per_minute
FROM naap.events
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_ts)
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
GROUP BY time, stage
ORDER BY time

WITH ens AS (SELECT eth_address AS addr, name AS ens_name FROM naap.orch_metadata FINAL),
active_counts AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, countDistinct(stream_id) AS active_streams
    FROM naap.agg_stream_status_samples
    WHERE sample_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE AND is_attributed = 1 AND orch_address != ''
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY addr
)
SELECT a.addr AS "Orchestrator Address",
    if(ifNull(ens.ens_name, '') != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(ens.ens_name), '0x'), ens.ens_name, a.addr) AS "Orchestrator ENS",
    toUInt64(a.active_streams) AS "Active Streams"
FROM active_counts a
LEFT JOIN ens e ON e.addr = a.addr
WHERE ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), a.addr))
ORDER BY "Active Streams" DESC, "Orchestrator Address" ASC
LIMIT 12

WITH ens AS (SELECT eth_address AS addr, name AS ens_name FROM naap.orch_metadata FINAL),
active_paths AS (
    SELECT orch_address AS addr, gateway,
        ifNull(nullIf(pipeline, ''), 'unknown') AS pipeline,
        countDistinct(stream_id) AS active_streams,
        round(avg(output_fps), 2) AS avg_fps
    FROM naap.agg_stream_status_samples
    WHERE sample_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE AND is_attributed = 1 AND orch_address != ''
    AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
    GROUP BY addr, gateway, pipeline
)
SELECT ifNull(gateway, 'unknown') AS "From",
    if(ifNull(ens.ens_name, '') != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(ens.ens_name), '0x'), ens.ens_name, a.addr) AS "Orchestrator",
    a.pipeline AS "Pipeline",
    toUInt64(a.active_streams) AS "Active Streams (15m)",
    toFloat64(a.avg_fps) AS "Avg FPS"
FROM active_paths a
LEFT JOIN ens e ON e.addr = a.addr
WHERE ('${orchestrator:csv}' = '__all' OR '${orchestrator:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${orchestrator:csv}'), a.addr))
ORDER BY "Active Streams (15m)" DESC, "Avg FPS" DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT event_ts AS "Time",
    event_type AS "Stage",
    JSONExtractString(data, 'pipeline') AS "Pipeline",
    gateway AS "Gateway",
    org AS "Org",
    JSONExtractString(data, 'stream_id') AS "Stream ID"
FROM naap.events
WHERE event_ts >= now() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE
AND ('${org:csv}' = '__all' OR '${org:csv}' = '' OR has(splitByChar(',', '${org:csv}'), org))
ORDER BY "Time" DESC
LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM livepeer_analytics.fact_workflow_sessions WHERE ifNull(org, '') != '' ORDER BY org
list.label: Org
list.name: org
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT org FROM naap.events WHERE org != '' ORDER BY org

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM livepeer_analytics.dim_orchestrator_capability_current WHERE ifNull(model_id,'') != '' ORDER BY model_id
list.label: Model
list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model_id FROM naap.agg_gpu_inventory WHERE model_id != '' ORDER BY model_id

list.definition: WITH orchestrators AS (SELECT DISTINCT lower(orchestrator_address) AS addr FROM livepeer_analytics.dim_orchestrator_capability_current WHERE ifNull(orchestrator_address, '') != ''), ens AS (SELECT eth_address AS addr, ens_name FROM livepeer_analytics.v_dim_ens_names) SELECT orchestrators.addr AS value, if(ifNull(ens_name, '') != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(ens_name), '0x'), concat(ens_name, ' (', orchestrators.addr, ')'), orchestrators.addr) AS text FROM orchestrators LEFT JOIN ens ON orchestrators.addr = ens.addr ORDER BY if(ifNull(ens_name, '') != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(ens_name), '0x'), 1, 0) DESC, text
list.label: Orchestrator (ENS)
list.name: orchestrator
list.query: WITH o AS (SELECT DISTINCT orch_address FROM naap.agg_orch_state FINAL) SELECT o.orch_address AS value, if(m.name != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(m.name), '0x'), concat(m.name, ' (', o.orch_address, ')'), o.orch_address) AS text FROM o LEFT JOIN naap.orch_metadata FINAL m ON m.eth_address = o.orch_address ORDER BY if(m.name != '' AND NOT startsWith(lower(m.name), '0x'), 1, 0) DESC, text
